channel.title: power consumption on
channel.description: Recent content in power consumption on

item.title: Turn ESP32 Into a Smart Energy Meter with Home Assistant Integration
item.description: I’ve always been a bit obsessed with data, especially when it comes to understanding my home’s energy consumption. After getting hit with a surprisingly high electricity bill last winter, I decided it was time to stop guessing and start measuring. Commercial smart plugs with energy monitoring are great, but what if you want to monitor a whole circuit, like your kitchen or workshop? That’s when I decided to turn an ESP32 into a smart energy meter.
